ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" TEXT /* Release year of the movie */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio that produced the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the director of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "movie_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "box_office" INTEGER /* Box office revenue of the movie */,
  "production_countries" TEXT /* Countries where the movie was produced */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards the movie has won */,
  "trailer_views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the trailer */,
  "trailer_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the trailer */,
  "trailer_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes on the trailer */,
  "trailer_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_studio_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_id") REFERENCES studios ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the studio logo */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the studio was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the studio's headquarters */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the studio's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the studio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Any awards the director has won */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* List of notable works by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casts" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie the cast is part of */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Description of the character played by the actor */,
  "order_in_cast" INTEGER /* Order of the actor in the cast list */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_casts_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being rated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes, Metacritic) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating value */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review from the rating source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "useful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as useful */,
  "funny_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as funny */,
  "cool_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as cool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user, content creator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who saved the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie saved */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewing_history" (
  "viewing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewing entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who viewed the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the movie viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was viewed */,
  "duration_watched" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie watched by the user */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used by the user to watch the movie (e.g., mobile, desktop, TV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viewing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewing_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
